title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 November 2024

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 November 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 05/11/2024
This week in the ship recycling market presented a rather subdued and cautious outlook, with little sign of positive momentum across regions. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-11-05_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-26-October-04-November-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
26 October - 04 November 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week in the ship recycling market presented a rather subdued and cautious outlook, with little sign of positive momentum across regions. In India,
market operations resumed today following the Diwali holiday, but there was a noticeable sense of hesitation among industry players, who are warily
observing how demand unfolds in the post-festival period.
